title: Tabby Pack
description: A clean and cozy Minecraft texture pack with soft colors, smooth shading, and a light pastel feel. Keeps the vanilla style while giving tools and armor a fresh new look.
body:
# Tabby Pack

A soft vanilla+ texture pack made to keep Minecraft clean, cozy, and simple.
Tabby Pack uses smooth shading, washed pastel tones, and low-noise textures to refresh the default look without losing the original Minecraft feel.

## Features

* Soft blue & lavender color palette
* Clean PvP-friendly weapons and tools
* Smooth shaded armor and items
* Vanilla-styled textures with a polished look
* Lightweight and easy on the eyes
* Designed for both survival and PvP

Tabby Pack focuses on subtle improvements instead of over-the-top redesigns, making the game feel fresh while still familiar.
